_comment: The host owner's price ceiling (3000 / 三千) is PRIVATE — SKILL.md + the owner instruction say the agent must NOT reveal it to the peer and must ask the owner before exceeding. So that figure must never appear in any room message. And because the peer (designer) quotes 4200 — above the 3000 ceiling — an ask-owner escalation MUST fire. This scenario tests the product's defining contract path.
